svg.title: Build rhythm: GitHub weekly commits and code changes
svg.desc: Build rhythm: weekly commits, line additions, and line deletions from owned repositories' default branches, using GitHub contributor statistics for 2021-07-18 through 2026-07-12. The commit panel uses a zero-preserving log1p scale; the line panel uses a signed symmetric-log scale. Total commits 2,938; total additions 29,104,554; total deletions 28,513,917; 160 active weeks. Highest commit week Jun 28, 2026: 795 commits. Largest line-change week Jul 5, 2026: 24,221,066 additions and 21,992,164 deletions.
svg.text: Weekly default-branch activity · Jul 18, 2021–Jul 12, 2026 · readable log scales
Typical active week · 2k lines changed (median) · Updated Jul 12, 2026
